mnemonics: Noise is like adding Salt & Pepper (impulse noise) or Grainy Gaussian (Gaussian noise) to your colorful image, making it messy.
keyPoints: Color images are affected by noise in their individual RGB channels or other color spaces.
Common types include Gaussian noise (additive) and impulse noise (salt-and-pepper).
Noise reduction must consider color correlations to avoid introducing color artifacts.
commonMistakes: Applying grayscale denoising techniques directly to color channels, which can distort color balance.
Ignoring the correlation between color channels when filtering, leading to a loss of color fidelity.
